---
title: "compactness_penalty"
generated: true
description: "How spread-out is each region's weight from its own centre of mass?"
---

[вЂ№ back to `nitrix.geometry.coords`](../nitrix-geometry-coords.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:compactness_penalty -->
```python
compactness_penalty(weight: Float[Array, '... n_regions n_points'], coords: Float[Array, '... n_points ndim'], *, norm: Union[int, float] = 2, floor: float = 0.0, radius: Optional[float] = None) -> Float[Array, '... n_regions']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:compactness_penalty -->
How spread-out is each region's weight from its own centre of mass?

Returns a scalar per region: large values mean the weight is
dispersed (incoherent region); small values mean it concentrates
near a single locus.  The standard use is as a regulariser
pulling region weights toward compact, contiguous supports.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:compactness_penalty -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `weight` | `Float` | `...` Г— `n_regions` Г— `n_points` | вЂ” | Non-negative weights, `(..., n_regions, n_points)`. |
| `coords` | `Float` | `...` Г— `n_points` Г— `ndim` | вЂ” | Per-point coordinates, `(..., n_points, ndim)`. |
| `norm` | `Union[int, float]` | вЂ” | `2` | The order $p$ of the $L_p$ norm used as the distance from each point to the region's centre of mass. Default `2` (Euclidean). |
| `floor` | `float` | вЂ” | `0.0` | Distances below `floor` are clamped to zero. Useful when the centre-of-mass lies inside a coherent support and we want the penalty to only "punish" points truly outside. |
| `radius` | `Optional[float]` | вЂ” | `None` | If given, the centre of mass is projected onto a sphere of that radius and distances are spherical geodesics. Use this for region weights defined over a 2-sphere. |

**Returns** `Float` вЂ” shape `...` Г— `n_regions`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen perf:compactness_penalty -->
:::: {.callout-note title="Benchmarks вЂ” nitrix-perf-bench" collapse="true"}
GPU steady-state **124.4 Вµs** (median, L4); up to **223.76Г— faster** than `numpy.compactness`.  [full report](https://github.com/hypercoil/nitrix-perf-bench/blob/main/reports/PERF_COMPACTNESS_PENALTY.md)

::: {.table-responsive}
| case | platform | param | baseline | status | steady (min/med) | compile | mem | fidelity | ratio |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| compactness_penalty | jax-cpu | p=1024 | `cupy.compactness_penalty` | skipped | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” |
| compactness_penalty | jax-cpu | p=1024 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 99.0 Вµs / 103.1 Вµs | 109.55 ms | 774 MB (rss) | вњ“ 0.00019Г—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| compactness_penalty | jax-cpu | p=1024 | `numpy.compactness` | ok | 2.16 ms / 2.16 ms | 2.24 ms | 774 MB (rss) | вњ“ 5.9e-05Г—tol | 21.81x vs nitrix-jax |
| compactness_penalty | jax-cuda12 | p=1024 | `cupy.compactness_penalty` | ok | 276.4 Вµs / 281.8 Вµs | 460.66 ms | 0.27 MB (hbm) | вњ“ 9.6e-05Г—tol | 2.37x vs nitrix-jax |
| compactness_penalty | jax-cuda12 | p=1024 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 116.4 Вµs / 124.4 Вµs | 517.27 ms | 100.94 MB (hbm) | вњ“ 7.6e-05Г—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| compactness_penalty | jax-cuda12 | p=1024 | `numpy.compactness` | ok | 2.34 ms / 2.35 ms | 3.04 ms | 0.27 MB (hbm) | вњ“ 5.9e-05Г—tol | 20.14x vs nitrix-jax |
| compactness_penalty | jax-cpu | p=16384 | `cupy.compactness_penalty` | skipped | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” |
| compactness_penalty | jax-cpu | p=16384 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 930.5 Вµs / 1.98 ms | 183.39 ms | 774 MB (rss) | вњ“ 7.6e-05Г—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| compactness_penalty | jax-cpu | p=16384 | `numpy.compactness` | ok | 31.41 ms / 41.47 ms | 35.44 ms | 774 MB (rss) | вњ“ 7e-05Г—tol | 33.76x vs nitrix-jax |
| compactness_penalty | jax-cuda12 | p=16384 | `cupy.compactness_penalty` | ok | 1.91 ms / 1.93 ms | 237.06 ms | 4.39 MB (hbm) | вњ“ 9.1e-05Г—tol | 14.35x vs nitrix-jax |
| compactness_penalty | jax-cuda12 | p=16384 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 133.4 Вµs / 140.2 Вµs | 681.70 ms | 75.74 MB (hbm) | вњ“ 7.4e-05Г—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| compactness_penalty | jax-cuda12 | p=16384 | `numpy.compactness` | ok | 29.84 ms / 30.00 ms | 30.07 ms | 4.39 MB (hbm) | вњ“ 7e-05Г—tol | 223.76x vs nitrix-jax |
| compactness_penalty | jax-cpu | p=4096 | `cupy.compactness_penalty` | skipped | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” |
| compactness_penalty | jax-cpu | p=4096 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 250.4 Вµs / 262.9 Вµs | 169.71 ms | 774 MB (rss) | вњ“ 0.00012Г—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| compactness_penalty | jax-cpu | p=4096 | `numpy.compactness` | ok | 7.59 ms / 7.82 ms | 7.65 ms | 774 MB (rss) | вњ“ 6.5e-05Г—tol | 30.31x vs nitrix-jax |
| compactness_penalty | jax-cuda12 | p=4096 | `cupy.compactness_penalty` | ok | 592.0 Вµs / 599.4 Вµs | 214.10 ms | 1.10 MB (hbm) | вњ“ 0.00012Г—tol | 5.09x vs nitrix-jax |
| compactness_penalty | jax-cuda12 | p=4096 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 116.4 Вµs / 120.3 Вµs | 643.35 ms | 84.99 MB (hbm) | вњ“ 8.4e-05Г—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| compactness_penalty | jax-cuda12 | p=4096 | `numpy.compactness` | ok | 7.39 ms / 7.54 ms | 8.25 ms | 1.10 MB (hbm) | вњ“ 6.5e-05Г—tol | 63.52x vs nitrix-jax |
:::

*source: bench `8171f3fa` В· nitrix `f42e7ff8`*
::::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:compactness_penalty -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `n_regions` | *(undocumented вЂ” add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `n_points` | *(undocumented вЂ” add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `ndim` | number of spatial dimensions |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
